atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive used to inject the base, components, and utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive used to inline existing utility classes into a custom rule.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive used to place custom styles into the base, components, or utilities layer.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive used to point a stylesheet at a specific Tailwind config file.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive used to wrap styles in a configured breakpoint.

atDirectives.name: @responsive
atDirectives.description: Legacy Tailwind CSS directive for generating responsive variants.

atDirectives.name: @variants
atDirectives.description: Legacy Tailwind CSS directive for generating state variants.
